source_pr.title: *: fix race with atomic global variables.

symptoms: *: fix race with atomic global variables.
failure_signature: *: fix race with atomic global variables.
root_cause_explanation: Tests and code were mutating/reading a global flag (TurnOnNewExprEval) without synchronization, which can trigger data races under concurrent test execution or -race. This PR makes the flag atomic (int32 + atomic Load/Store) and updates call sites to eliminate the race.
fix_pattern: Make global flags atomic and use atomic Load/Store to avoid data races.

evidence: evidence: *: fix race with atomic global variables.
files: executor/aggregate_test.go, executor/executor_test.go, expression/evaluator_test.go, expression/expression.go, expression/scalar_function.go, plan/expression_test.go
